formatted_summary:
agent1 (Round 2 summarized): Aggressive surgical debulking to achieve residual disease of less than 1–2 mm is strongly associated with improved survival and better response to adjuvant therapies in primary ovarian cancer. Despite limited benefits observed in recurrent cases due to conflicting trial results such as GOG-213, these findings do not invalidate the critical role of surgical effort in initial quaternary cytoreductive procedures.  

\boxed{A}

The summary should end with \boxed{A}. Do NOT include any additional text after the boxed answer.

Summary:  
Aggressive surgical debulking to achieve residual disease of less than 1–2 mm is strongly associated with improved survival and better response to adjuvant therapies in primary ovarian cancer. Despite limitations in recurrent disease contexts, the cornerstone status of surgical effort in initial quaternary cytoreduction remains well-supported.  

\boxed{A}. Answer choice: A
